title: Intro to Chemical Reactions

contentBlocks.text: Chemical reactions occur when substances change their properties.

items.heading: Example: Baking a Cake
items.text: Ingredients combine and change to form a new product with different properties.

contentBlocks.text: Just like baking, chemical reactions transform starting materials into something new.

imagePrompt: A warm kitchen scene with ingredients and a freshly baked cake, evoking transformation and creation
